name: MISPEvent
description: Check if IOCs shared by the community have been seen on the network

tasks.title: Search for IOCs on Mail gateway logs
tasks.description: Run queries in Mail gateway logs and look for IOcs of type IP, email addresses, hostnames, free text.

tasks.title: Search for IOCs on Firewall logs
tasks.description: Run queries in firewall logs and look for IOcs of type IP, port

tasks.title: Search for IOCs on Web proxy logs
tasks.description: Run queries in web proxy logs and look for IOcs of type IP, domain, hostname, user-agent

extraData.content:
Incident Summary:
Brief description of the incident and how it was detected.

Detection Source:
Tool or system that generated the alert.

Analysis Performed:
Summary of Cortex analyzers, MISP correlation, and manual analysis.

Findings:
Key indicators and conclusions.

Response Actions:
Containment, remediation, or monitoring actions taken.

Outcome:
Final status of the incident.

Lessons Learned:
Recommendations or improvements.
